about.label: About Me
about.title: About Me
about.backgroundText: My name is Ostap, and I am a Junior Software Developer originally from Ukraine, currently based in Canada. Three years ago, I moved to Mount Pearl after living in Poland from 2019 to 2022, where I completed my high school education. Living in different countries has helped me become adaptable, open-minded, and confident in new environments. I am a friendly and outgoing person who enjoys meeting new people, learning continuously, and improving myself. I am always open to new opportunities and challenges, and I have a strong competitive mindset that motivates me to push my limits and grow both personally and professionally. I am passionate about technology and creativity, always looking for new ways to express ideas and turn them into real solutions.
about.valuesText: I am a dedicated and growth-oriented person who takes pride in delivering high-quality work. I approach every task with responsibility and attention to detail, always striving to achieve the best possible results. I am curious, open-minded, and committed to continuous learning, constantly exploring new technologies and improving my skills as a developer. I value teamwork and believe that strong communication and collaboration lead to better outcomes. I am approachable, reliable, and supportive, and I aim to contribute positively to any team environment. Honesty and humility guide my actions and help me build trust with others. I strongly believe that adaptability and lifelong learning are essential for long-term personal and professional success.
about.hobbiesText: In my free time, I enjoy participating in events such as hackathons, where I can collaborate with others and work on real-world ideas. During one hackathon, I worked in a team of three to develop a local event radar for the city where I currently live. I also took part in an entrepreneurship hackathon, collaborating with a team to identify challenges faced by newcomers and small businesses and propose practical solutions. Outside of tech, I am a big fan of Formula 1 and have a strong interest in history. Back in Ukraine, I participated in history Olympiads and achieved national-level recognition.

hero.title: Hi, I'm Ostap
hero.description1: Hi! I'm Ostap Demchuk, a motivated and driven individual who enjoys taking on new challenges and constantly improving myself.
hero.description2: I am a hardworking and positive person with a strong sense of responsibility. I value discipline, consistency, and always giving my best in everything I do.
hero.description3: I enjoy working with people, learning from others, and growing in environments where I can push my limits and develop both personally and professionally.
hero.description4: My goal is to become a reliable and skilled professional who can contribute to meaningful projects and create real impact through my work.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for opportunities, collaboration, or just to connect.

projects.title: Projects
projects.chatappDesc: A full-stack real-time chat application with user authentication, responsive design, and instant messaging features.
projects.posDesc: A full-stack POS web app with authentication, order management, and Stripe payment integration.
projects.ecommerceDesc: An AI-powered customer support chatbot built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Lucide React, and Redux Toolkit for state management.
projects.medicalDesc: An AI-powered medical chatbot that uses LangChain, Pinecone, Flask, and OpenAI to answer medical-related questions using vector search and LLM responses.
projects.todoDesc: A simple and clean to-do list application built with React.
projects.libraryDesc: A Java-based library management system with book handling, borrowing logic, validation, and unit testing.

experience.skillCategory2Skills: RESTful APIs, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Test-Driven Development (TDD), Database Design, Agile, Scrum, Waterfall

job1.description: Worked on frontend improvements and AI-powered features in a startup environment.
job1.point1: Improved and enhanced the frontend of the main application page using React
job1.point2: Learned and implemented AI workflows using LangChain and LangGraph
job1.point3: Collaborated with developers during team meetings to align technical solutions with product goals
job1.point4: Contributed to debugging, testing, and improving application performance
